name: @repo/registry
description: Zod schemas for Repository Control Plane (ADR-058 V1). 3-layer registry : Layer 1 auto (audit/registry/*.json) + Layer 2 overlay manuel (.spec/00-canon/repository-registry/*.yaml) + Layer 3 projection canonique générée (canonical.json). Schema versioning SemVer, status UNKNOWN + sourceConfidence pour classification jamais forcée.
